name: GOLFTEC College Station
address: 1505 University Dr E Suite 410, College Station, TX 77840
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and training facility that uses advanced data analysis to help golfers improve. Their lessons are built around OPTIMOTION motion measurement technology, high-speed video, and launch monitors to provide objective feedback and personalized coaching. The service is structured around a foundational Swing Evaluation that creates a customized game plan for players, with options for ongoing lessons, practice sessions, and club fitting services. The approach is data-centric, focusing on measurable swing metrics to drive improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and motion capture
Structured improvement plans based on objective swing analysis
Access to technology not available on traditional driving ranges

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings. Their fitting service helps determine the best clubs for your game, which can then be purchased through them at competitive prices.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The provided website content does not mention a policy on outside food or beverages. For specific details, it is best to contact the center directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on instruction and practice rather than full 18-hole simulator rounds. The time for a lesson or practice session varies depending on the specific package and goals.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior instruction programs, indicating they cater to younger golfers. The structured, technology-based environment is suitable for kids learning with professional guidance.
